headline: Reassessing Progressive (PGR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Market Signals
summary: Why Progressive (PGR) is back in focus for investors Progressive (PGR) is drawing fresh attention as investors reassess the insurer after a stretch of weaker share performance over the past year, prompting closer scrutiny of its fundamentals and valuation. See our latest analysis for Progressive. At a share price of US$194.13, Progressive has seen pressure build in recent months, with a 30-day share price return of 3.52% and a year to date share price return of an 8.48% decline.
